text: {"type":"permission_request","request_id":"perm-1773290415542-l9g5w82","agent_id":"posthog-wiring","tool_name":"Bash","tool_use_id":"toolu_011hA3oisCVuKrEn9NGLqU2Z","description":"Create and verify worktree","input":{"command":"REPO_ROOT=\"$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)\" && BRANCH_NAME=\"worktree/posthog-wiring\" && WORKTREE_DIR=\"$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME\" && if [ -d \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" ]; then echo \"Worktree already exists, reusing\"; else git worktree add \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" -b \"$BRANCH_NAME\"; fi && cd \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" && echo \"CWD: $(pwd)\" && echo \"Branch: $(git branch --show-current)\" && echo \"$(pwd)\" | grep -q '\\.claude/worktrees/' && echo \"WORKTREE VERIFIED\" || echo \"FATAL: NOT in a worktree\"","description":"Create and verify worktree"},"permission_suggestions":[]}
